phase-summary.outcome: The Model Schema selector now uses `react-arborist` with grouped namespace nodes (`entity`, `item`, `room`, etc.) and leaf model selection.

file.description: Added `ModelTreeNode` data model, grouped `modelSchemaTreeData`, and `Tree` renderer with selection/activation handlers.
Added `react-arborist` dependency for hierarchical model navigation.

tests.test: `pnpm --dir docs-site run typecheck` still reports unrelated existing errors in `app/dungeonbreak-content-app/dungeon-explorer/page.tsx` only.

next.action: Optional: add search/filter input above the tree for fast model lookup.
